data.description:
## Context
A gap analysis (see ~/rebar_vs_dso_code_review_gap_report.md and session log warn/dso) compared
digital-service-orchestra's (dso) LLM code review to rebar's four-pass gate. dso's severity is
model-authored and governed by a large hand-tuned rubric plus five compensating adjudicators;
rebar's verdict is deterministic arithmetic over a narrow, independently-verified Pass-2. This epic
adopts dso's hard-won CALIBRATION CONTENT (checklists, false-positive guards, evidence discipline)
into rebar's STRUCTURE (find -> verify -> decide -> coach), WITHOUT importing dso's compensating
mechanisms. Governing principle (locked with user): domain-specific recall AND FP-guards live in each
specialist overlay; the generic Pass-2 verifier is never taught a single domain's rubric; anything
dso front-loads into its finder only because it lacks a universal verifier is either relocated to
Pass 2 or dropped. Deterministic checks are preferred for unambiguous polyglot facts; LLM find+verify
for context-dependent judgment.

## Success Criteria
- Every prompt/detector change lands with a passing eval (no-fire + recall cases seeded from dso's
  documented FP incidents and defect classes) so calibration is regression-tested, not vibes.
- Measurable increase in valid-finding recall and reduction in advisory nit/FP noise vs. the current
  gate baseline, without any new source of BLOCK beyond the existing deterministic security detectors.
- rebar's four-pass architecture is preserved: deterministic verdict, generic Pass-2, coach-not-block,
  enforcement-in-types. No kernel/verification-contract change shared with plan-review.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Eval foundation exists for the base/overlay/verify prompts and gates the other stories.
- [ ] Base prompt carries the experiment-backed positive linter-deference line only.
- [ ] Content-triggered overlay capability shipped; deletion-impact and scope-intent overlays use it.
- [ ] tests overlay carries the full behavioral-testing standard (both halves); Pass 2 stays generic.
- [ ] Pass-2 verifier prompt upgraded (contradiction/caller/arithmetic/absence; prefer AST-LSP).
- [ ] All five specialist overlays (security, performance, api-compat, db-migrations, llm-prompts) enriched.
- [ ] conflict-marker deterministic detector wired as an advisory fail-open DET criterion.
- [ ] scope-intent overlay checks the diff against the UNION of all trailer-referenced tickets.
- [ ] FP-ledger convention, grounding-effort/health telemetry, coach moves, approach-viability note landed.
- [ ] Cross-patchset memory (#6) split to its own linked epic, not implemented here.
data.title: Adopt dso code-review calibration into rebar's four-pass gate
